title: Same Tree
input_format: The roots of two binary trees `p` and `q`.
output_format: `true` if they are the same, `false` otherwise.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in both trees is in the range `[0, 100]`.
- `-10^4 <= Node.val <= 10^4`
function_signature: function isSameTree(p: TreeNode | null, q: TreeNode | null): boolean {}
